summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Samachar Group news website. Backend APIs working perfectly (16/16 tests passed). Frontend mostly functional with critical React Quill editor issue preventing article creation/editing.

ui_bugs.issue: ReactQuill component throws JavaScript errors: 'react_dom_1.default.findDOMMode is not a function'
ui_bugs.impact: Prevents reporters from creating/editing articles through UI

integration_issues.issue: Editor page navigation works but page fails to render due to ReactQuill errors

passed_tests: Homepage loads with Bento Grid featured articles layout
Reporter dashboard with all stat cards
Admin dashboard with article management interface
Admin stats display (7 total articles, 7 published, 2 users, 1 reporter)
Article management table with proper filtering
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix ReactQuill editor component - JavaScript error 'react_dom_1.default.findDOMMode is not a function' prevents article creation/editing. This may be a version compatibility issue between ReactQuill and React/ReactDOM versions.
